title: Charity Governance Diagnostic Tool
completedHtml: Thank you for taking the time to reflect. Your personalised governance report is being prepared and will be emailed to you shortly.

elements.name: intro_text
elements.html:
Charity Governance Diagnostic Tool

This is a supportive, non‑judgemental tool to help you think about how governance is working in your charity.

Respond honestly with what feels true for you.

For each statement, select 1 star for 'Not at all true', all the way up to 5 stars for 'Fully true'.

elements.name: name
elements.title: Your name (optional)

elements.name: email
elements.title: Your email address

elements.name: charity
elements.title: Charity name (optional)

elements.name: s1_text
elements.html:
Purpose & Strategy

This section gives you space to reflect honestly on how clearly your charity’s purpose and direction are understood in practice.

elements.name: q1
elements.title: Our charity’s purpose feels clear and well‑understood across the organisation.

elements.name: q2
elements.title: We have a shared sense of the difference we aim to make and who we exist to serve.

elements.name: q3
elements.title: Our strategic priorities feel realistic, relevant and grounded in our purpose.

elements.name: q4
elements.title: Trustees and staff have a common understanding of what success looks like.

elements.name: q5
elements.title: We regularly reflect on whether our activities still align with our purpose.

elements.name: q6
elements.title: We make decisions with a clear sense of the impact we want to achieve.

elements.name: q7
elements.title: We understand the needs of the people or communities we serve.

elements.name: q8
elements.title: We adapt our plans when circumstances change, while staying true to our purpose.

elements.name: q9
elements.title: We think long-term and use evidence, insight and feedback to shape our strategic direction.

elements.name: q10
elements.title: Trustees feel confident that the charity is moving in a purposeful, coherent direction.

elements.name: s2_text
elements.html:
Financial Health & Resilience

These questions help you consider how confidently you feel about your charity’s financial position and future stability.

elements.name: q11
elements.title: We receive clear financial reports that give us a clear picture of our financial position and what it means for our work.

elements.name: q12
elements.title: Our income feels stable enough to support our plans and commitments.

elements.name: q13
elements.title: We understand the financial risks we face and how to manage them.

elements.name: q14
elements.title: Trustees feel confident reading and interpreting financial information.

elements.name: q15
elements.title: We plan ahead to ensure long‑term financial sustainability.

elements.name: question1
elements.title: We use our funds responsibly and in line with our charitable purpose.

elements.name: question2
elements.title: We have appropriate reserves or contingency plans for unexpected challenges.

elements.name: question3
elements.title: We monitor income and expenditure regularly and respond to changes promptly.

elements.name: question4
elements.title: We explore opportunities to diversify or strengthen our income where needed.

elements.name: question5
elements.title: Financial decisions feel transparent, well‑explained and aligned with our values.

elements.name: s3_text
elements.html:
Governance & Trustee Duties

Here you can reflect on how well your board’s responsibilities are understood and how effectively trustees work together.

elements.name: q21
elements.title: Trustees understand their responsibilities and feel confident in their role.

elements.name: q22
elements.title: Our board works well together and supports constructive, respectful discussion.

elements.name: q23
elements.title: We have the skills and experience we need to govern effectively.

elements.name: q24
elements.title: We make decisions in a clear, transparent and well‑informed way.

elements.name: q25
elements.title: We review our governance arrangements and adapt them when needed.

elements.name: q26
elements.title: Trustees feel able to ask questions, seek clarification and challenge appropriately.

elements.name: q27
elements.title: We have clear boundaries between governance and day‑to‑day management.

elements.name: q28
elements.title: New trustees are welcomed and supported to contribute confidently.

elements.name: q29
elements.title: We reflect on our performance as a board and look for ways to improve.

elements.name: q30
elements.title: Our governance practices feel proportionate, practical and rooted in our purpose.

elements.name: s4_text
elements.html:
Risk, Controls & Compliance

This section supports you to think about how risks are identified and managed, and how confidently you feel about compliance.

elements.name: q31
elements.title: We have a clear understanding of the key risks facing our charity.

elements.name: q32
elements.title: We review risks regularly and take proportionate steps to manage them.

elements.name: q33
elements.title: Our policies and procedures feel practical, up‑to‑date and understood in practice.

elements.name: q34
elements.title: We are confident that we meet our legal and regulatory requirements.

elements.name: q35
elements.title: Safeguarding is taken seriously and embedded across our work.

elements.name: q36
elements.title: We respond promptly and openly when issues or concerns arise.

elements.name: q37
elements.title: We have clear processes for reporting, recording and learning from incidents.

elements.name: q38
elements.title: Trustees feel informed about compliance requirements relevant to our charity.

elements.name: q39
elements.title: We are aware of reputational risks and how to manage them.

elements.name: q40
elements.title: We feel confident overall about our compliance.

elements.name: s5_text
elements.html:
People & Culture

These questions invite you to reflect on how trustees work together, communicate, and create a constructive and supportive board environment.

elements.name: q41
elements.title: Our board culture is respectful and inclusive.

elements.name: q42
elements.title: Trustees listen to each other carefully.

elements.name: q43
elements.title: We work in a way that feels inclusive and welcoming to different perspectives.

elements.name: q44
elements.title: We handle challenges or disagreements in a constructive, fair way.

elements.name: q45
elements.title: We take staff and volunteer wellbeing seriously and act on concerns.

elements.name: q46
elements.title: There is clarity between governance and operational roles.

elements.name: q47
elements.title: Communication within the board is clear, open, kind and respectful.

elements.name: q48
elements.title: Trustees feel able to speak openly and honestly.

elements.name: q49
elements.title: All trustees are encouraged to contribute.

elements.name: q50
elements.title: There is a strong sense of trust within the board.

elements.name: s6_text
elements.html:
Operations & Resources

This section helps you consider how well your charity’s resources, systems and day‑to‑day operations support its work.

elements.name: q51
elements.title: Our charity has the systems and processes it needs to deliver work reliably and safely.

elements.name: q52
elements.title: We make good use of the resources we have (people, time, equipment, funding).

elements.name: q53
elements.title: Operational tasks are carried out consistently and to a good standard.

elements.name: q54
elements.title: We have clear processes for planning, monitoring and improving our day‑to‑day work.

elements.name: q55
elements.title: Staff and volunteers have the tools and information they need to do their roles well.

elements.name: q56
elements.title: We manage our workload effectively and avoid unnecessary pressure or duplication.

elements.name: q57
elements.title: We respond well when operational issues or challenges arise.

elements.name: q58
elements.title: We regularly review whether our systems and processes are still fit for purpose.

elements.name: q59
elements.title: We use data and feedback to improve how our services or activities run.

elements.name: q60
elements.title: Trustees have a good understanding of how operations work in practice.

elements.name: s7_text
elements.html:
Transparency & Accountability

Here you can reflect on how openly and clearly your charity communicates, reports and builds trust with the people it serves.

elements.name: q61
elements.title: We communicate clearly and openly about our work, decisions and impact.

elements.name: q62
elements.title: Our reporting (financial and non‑financial) is accurate, timely and easy to understand.

elements.name: q63
elements.title: We are transparent about how we use funds and the difference they make.

elements.name: q64
elements.title: We listen to feedback from the people we serve and respond constructively.

elements.name: q65
elements.title: We share information proactively with stakeholders, not only when asked.

elements.name: q66
elements.title: Trustees understand their responsibilities for accountability and public trust.

elements.name: q67
elements.title: We handle concerns or complaints in a fair, transparent and timely way.

elements.name: q68
elements.title: We are open about risks, challenges and areas where improvement is needed.

elements.name: q69
elements.title: We demonstrate our values through our behaviour, decisions and communication.

elements.name: q70
elements.title: People who interact with our charity feel informed, respected and able to raise questions.

elements.name: question7
elements.html:
Your governance reflection score

This is not a judgement — just a starting point for reflection.

{percentageScore}%

elements.name: What this score indicates:
elements.expression: iif({percentageScore} >= 80, 'Your governance appears strong and well-balanced.', iif({percentageScore} >= 60, 'Your governance is generally sound, with some areas to strengthen.', iif({percentageScore} >= 40, 'There are areas where governance could be strengthened.', 'Governance may be under strain and would benefit from focused support.')))
